latest.title: Trees live twice as long underground
latest.script_key: trees last twice as long below ground than above it you see that bark it s just a jacket the real life happens in the roots and soil that s why because the tree hides its age in the roots where it s cooler safer and fed by fungi did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Dogs aren't just playing with sticks

latest.title: Trees don’t just stand still in water

latest.title: Trees don't have holes like this for no reason
